title: ModMcraft
description:
This mod adds multiple creepy additions to Minecraft including:
The Slint, a horrifying mob that kills on sight,
And a few items that don't do anything yet.
body:
This is the first mod I've made. It has been a good time making this mod. I hope you all enjoy.







<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**This mod adds multiple creepy additions to Minecraft including**:
1. The _Slint_, a horrifying mob that kills on sight
2. a few items that don't do anything yet


</details>


but if you like this mod maybe I'll make a new update for  it.
